dids.description: Engine running time since last service (h)

dids.description: DSG slip — difference between input and ratio*output (rpm)

dids.description: Airbag crash event count (lifetime, non-zero = locked)

dids.name: bcm_bulb_failure_bitmask

dids.name: ev_pack_charge_cycle_count
dids.description: Charge cycle count (lifetime, equivalent full cycles)

dids.description: Total energy discharged from pack (kWh, lifetime)

dids.description: Total DTC count across all ECUs

dids.description: Active ECU count on diagnostic bus

dids.description: Transfer case oil temperature (C, Audi MLB)
